pros: Simple REST API for Japan cards
review.verdict: Clean Stripe-style API for Japanese card acceptance, but misses key local methods bigger rivals cover.
review.best_for: Small Japanese merchants wanting a clean REST API for card-only checkout
review.not_for: Merchants needing PayPay, konbini, or carrier billing in Japan
